title: Mom said son of Gtano's client died within a week of getting the license — Forsaken for me
html:
TL;DR

  • A two-line March 2019 note from Mom relayed through Yahir: a Gtano's (Yahir's dad's tile business) client's son died within a week of getting his driver's license — Yahir tags it "Forsaken for me."
  • Earliest explicit mortality-as-decision-filter beat in the corpus — predates memento mori articulations by years and lands as a small dark omen rather than a meditation.
  • Sits 13 days after the Mr. Phillips Walmart/Costco/Disney investing-regret note — March 2019 is a tight self-discipline / scarcity / mortality triptych.
  • First named appearance of Gtano's in the corpus — Yahir's dad's tile business surfaces here as a transmission line for adult-world news (family grapevine).
  • The cryptic "Forsaken for me" sign-off is teen-Yahir doing the "I was spared, what do I owe with the time" read on someone else's catastrophe — proto-debt of gratitude.

Notes

The note is two sentences and a date. The work it does is disproportionate to its length. "Forsaken for me" — Yahir-as-17-year-old reading the news of a peer-aged death and writing back, in his journal, that he received the spared-life as a gift demanding something. This is the same instinct that produces the 2024 12 14 departing china "if I were to die today, my life will have been amazing" check eight years later. The legacy question template starts here.

The transmission path is itself important: Mom said → son of Gtano's client → died. The household receives news from the customer base of dad's tile business, and Yahir takes the relay. The news flows along the Gtano's grapevine — that's the social network of working Grants Pass adults at this point in his life.

The driver's-license framing makes it pierce. A peer-coded death — getting your license is the threshold-marker of becoming-an-adult in small-town Oregon. The cosmic irony of "died within a week" is what makes the Forsaken-for-me line legible: he is reading randomness and converting it into accountability.

Privacy note

No name attached to the deceased; no identifying detail beyond the relation to the Gtano's client base. No redactions needed.

Connections

  • 2019 03 12 those with urges tend to lose · 2019 03 14 mr phillips substitute — March 2019 sibling notes
  • gtanos — first named mention (also 2019 07 19 tile for alexandria, 2019 09 28 gtanos craigslist)
  • memento mori decision filter · legacy question · debt of gratitude
  • yahir family · iracema vargas · grants pass teen era
